- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change

- [ ] Integration tests added/updated

## Documentation
- [ ] Code comments updated
- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] API docs updated (if applicable)

-

## Backwards Compatibility

- [ ] Migration guide provided (if breaking)
